education.institution: California Polytechnic State University (Cal Poly San Luis Obispo)
education.notes: Animal Science / Animal Husbandry (per his own listing). Same Cal Poly Animal Husbandry program his twin brother George Lent Howard attended briefly — the cowboy interest was a shared family thread.
Per his own social media / education listing.

narrative_blocks.header: Twin born to Hooker-line Elizabeth Lent
narrative_blocks.body: Duncan Lent Howard was born September 9, 1940 in San Francisco, the elder twin of Lot D. Howard Jr. and Elizabeth Lent — making him the great-grandson of Bessie Augusta Hooker and through her a fifth-generation San Franciscan. His twin brother George Lent Howard shared the same birthday but lived a more rural-Western California cowboy life, while Duncan stayed engaged with San Francisco professional and academic worlds.

narrative_blocks.header: Animal husbandry, pre-law, then USF history
narrative_blocks.body: Duncan attended Cal Poly San Luis Obispo 1959-1961 studying Animal Science / Husbandry — the same program his twin George briefly attended for cowboy-life training. He later did pre-law at City College of San Francisco, then completed his Bachelor of Arts in Government and History at the University of San Francisco in 1970. The pivot from rural agriculture to humanities and pre-law tracked the tension between the two twins: George went west toward livestock and earth-moving, Duncan stayed urban.

narrative_blocks.header: Married Madeline Domning, raised two San Francisco sons
narrative_blocks.body: Duncan married Madeline Domning Howard (, b.Jun 18, 1942 Lima Peru — daughter of Loyal Gordon Domning 1913-2001 and Mozelle Alberta Lundy 1914-2006). Madeline died in San Francisco October 25, 1983 at age 41. Their two sons — Lent Duncan Howard (, 1968-2023) and Lyman Domning Howard (, b.1969) — both attended UC Berkeley.

death.cause: Per his published obituary: died after a lifetime battle with depression. Remembered as a beloved son, brother, friend, and godfather.

education.notes: Episcopal Choir School / preparatory boys' school SF.
Played lacrosse — one of his favorite team sports.

careers.employer: Commercial real estate, bartending, and other roles
careers.notes: Per his obituary: 'worked in a number of jobs and professions from commercial real estate to bartending, but anybody will tell you his passion was comedy.'

narrative_blocks.header: Fifth-generation San Franciscan with comedic genius
narrative_blocks.body: Lent Duncan Howard was born May 14, 1968 in San Francisco — a proud fifth-generation San Franciscan. Through his Hooker-Lent-Howard lineage he stretched back through Bessie Augusta Hooker Lent (his great-great-grandmother) to Charles Gay Hooker the 1851 California arrival. Per his published obituary, his sharp wit and irreverent humor 'endeared him to everyone he encountered, making us laugh until we cried.' His comedic genius found its way into every corner of his life — social media posts, shared texted memes, and the everyday rhythm of friendship.

Lent attended the Cathedral School for Boys in San Francisco, then went east to Saint Paul's School in Concord NH where he played lacrosse. He returned to California for college, earning his Bachelor of Arts in Political Science from the University of California, Berkeley in 1992. Lacrosse stayed his favorite team sport at both Saint Paul's and Cal.

narrative_blocks.header: Died after lifetime battle with depression
narrative_blocks.body: Lent died August 15, 2023 at age 55 after what his obituary describes as a lifetime battle with depression. He was predeceased by his mother Madeline Domning Howard (, d.1983) and is survived by his father Duncan Lent Howard, Duncan's partner Alexa Ehlen, his brother Lyman Domning Howard, sister-in-law Alison, and extended family from the Domning, Howard, Hooker, and Lent clans. As a godfather he held a special place in the lives of Thomas Hooker, James Jackson, Eva Paine, and Whitaker Tollmann.

marriages.notes: Per Lent's 2023 obituary: brother Lyman + 'sister-in-law Alison.' Alison's surname not documented in available sources; intentionally not built.

careers.location: 750 Battery Street 6th Floor, San Francisco CA 94111
careers.notes: Per SEC filing 2014: 'Portfolio Manager 2014 - Present.' At the same firm where Sam Talcott Hooker's distant cousin Anthony Shreve 'Tony' Hooker (HD3249) has been Senior Advisor since 1986 — the two distant Hooker descendants meet at Ashfield. Sam Talcott Hooker confirms cousin relationship.

narrative_blocks.header: Sixth-generation Hooker descendant via Bessie line
narrative_blocks.body: Born 1969 to Duncan Lent Howard and Madeline Domning Howard, who died when Lyman was around 14. Through his father Duncan he descends through Elizabeth Lent and Bessie Augusta Hooker Lent to Charles Gay Hooker — making him sixth-generation San Franciscan.

narrative_blocks.header: Joined godfather Tony's Ashfield firm in 2014
narrative_blocks.body: He joined Ashfield Capital Partners as Portfolio Manager in 2014, bringing him into daily contact with his godfather Anthony Shreve 'Tony' Hooker, who has been Senior Advisor at the firm since 2009. They are both Hooker descendants through different sons of Charles Gay Hooker.

cross_connections.display_label: Godson and distant cousin to Tony, both Ashfield managers.
